title: Vietnam Salary Calculator
subtitle: Calculate your net income easily with latest 2024 tax rules
faqDescription: Learn more about Vietnam salary laws and deduction rules.
a1: Every employee in Vietnam is entitled to a personal deduction of 11,000,000 VND per month from their taxable income.
a2: Dependents can include children under 18, students with low income, or elderly parents. Each dependent reduces your taxable income by 4,400,000 VND per month.
a3: Personal Income Tax (PIT) is calculated using a progressive table with rates from 5% to 35% based on your taxable income.
dependentTooltip: Each eligible dependent (children, parents) reduces taxable income by 4.4M VND/month.
grossTooltip: Your total salary before any insurance or tax deductions.
